body.title: reading-list-feeder
body.result: feed_reading_list() added to learner.py. PROC_READING_FEEDER seeded (hourly). Live test: 20 items fed, drain launched, igor_identity_master already processing.
body.description: Add feed_reading_list() tool: reads reading_list by encoding_arousal DESC, feeds top N into learn_queue.json, starts drain runner if idle. Seed PROC_READING_FEEDER habit (hourly).
